title: Governed Interpretation and Model-Use Boundary
description: Implement deterministic context- and authority-aware interpretation resolution and publish purpose-limited model-feedback packages with consent, privacy filtering, redaction, expiration, revocation, journaling, and immutable receipts.
acceptance_criteria: ResolveInterpretation is deterministic and context, domain, temporal validity, confidence, uncertainty, and authority aware
Retracted, expired, superseded, disputed, context-inapplicable, or unauthorized state cannot control model behavior
Model feedback is purpose-scoped, hash-bound, privacy-filtered, expirable, revocable, journaled, and receipted
Behavior evaluation fixtures prove current-state preference without erasing historical lineage
Forecasting and prediction remain noncanonical downstream consumers
